title: Every Level of Claude Explained in 21 Minutes
summary: Nate Herk provides a tutorial breaking down five levels of Claude mastery, from basic usage to running parallel sessions. The video covers features like artifacts, hidden functionality, and workflow optimization techniques accumulated over 400 hours of hands-on experience.
writeup: A structured progression through five levels of Claude proficiency, built around 400+ hours of hands-on use. The video maps concrete capability jumps: from treating Claude as a stateless search bar, through Projects with persistent memory and 50+ tool connectors, to Claude co-work's real file-system access and skills system. The through-line is that each level's ceiling is broken by adopting a specific feature or product shift, not by prompting harder.

key_points: Claude Projects are the single most leveraged move for most users: a system prompt plus a knowledge base turns every new chat into a preloaded, context-aware session that eliminates the 'starting from zero' problem and can recall decisions made weeks earlier.

File creation shipped to all plans including free, allowing Claude to generate real Excel spreadsheets with working formulas, PowerPoint decks, Word docs, and PDFs as downloadable files, shifting the tool from brainstorming aid to deliverable producer.

Artifacts now support persistent storage and direct Claude API calls, meaning a non-coder can build a working, shareable customer feedback tracker inside a chat and publish it with a public link, with no external builder required.

Claude co-work (paid plans only) runs code in an isolated virtual machine with real read-write access to granted folders, enabling one-shot commands like reorganizing an entire downloads folder by type and renaming files consistently while the user steps away.

The skills system lets users define reusable workflows as Markdown files; over 100 community and Anthropic-published skills cover front-end design, Excel, PDF manipulation, and marketing, installable with one command and usable across co-work, chat, and Claude code.

Claude design, an Anthropic Labs product included with Pro, reads a full codebase or brand guidelines to extract a design system, then applies that system to every generated prototype or landing page, producing brand-consistent output rather than generic AI layouts.
